title: erigeron latifolius
intro: Erigeron latifolius, also known as the leafy fleabane, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Erigeron latifolius include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Erigeron latifolius can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used in tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
